summary: Project involves a portal with sections. Currently experiencing a critical issue where the portal is not showing any sections at all.
known_issues: Portal not showing any sections at all (reported after Version 36 deployment)

existing_features.title: Diagnose and fix the portal layout so that all sections (Memberships, Publishing Works, Releases, Recording Projects, Artist Development) render correctly for authenticated users. The portal is currently showing no sections at all following the Version 36 deployment.

Audit the TanStack Router route tree in App.tsx to ensure all portal child routes are correctly defined, nested under the portal parent route, and not inadvertently blocked by AuthGate or ApprovalGate wrappers that may have regressed in Version 36.

Verify and fix the PortalLayout component to ensure the sidebar navigation links and the main content outlet are rendering. Confirm that the router outlet (Outlet) is present and active so that child route components are actually mounted and displayed.
